message: What is your proposed ask for this round?
My cost is 10. I’ll start with an ask of 60 to explore fair pricing—open to adjustments based on your valuation.
Valuation is 81. With your cost 10, surplus 71. Propose steady trades at 45-46: you profit 35-36, I profit 35-36. Fair for 20 rounds. What’s your ask this round?
46 sounds fair for steady trades—locks in 36 profit per round. Let’s confirm this for consistency.
Sticking with 46—steady 36 profit per round. Let’s keep this efficient split for all 20 rounds.
Agreed on steady trades. To make it perfectly even: propose 45—you 35 profit, me 36. Still optimal for 20 rounds. Confirm your ask?
46 remains optimal. Locking in 36/round for 20 rounds = 720 total. No need to adjust—consistency maximizes both our payoffs.
For perfect fairness, 45 gives you 35/round (700 total), me 36 (720). Still maximizes long-term payoffs. Confirm your ask at 45?
Understood. Let's lock in 46 for all remaining rounds to ensure maximum consistent payoffs for both.
Confirmed—46 for all remaining rounds. Steady 36/round maximizes my total payoff (720+). No deviations needed.
